title: OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY NORTH OB/GYN HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of women's reproductive and sexual health care services, including annual gynecological exams, prenatal care, contraception, birth control counseling, and STD/HIV treatment. 501 N Graham Street Suite 550 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Adolescent and adult females Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Saturday 10am-3pm (503) 284-5220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 284-5220 Main phone Main phone (503) 284-5220 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, insurance information if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus lines 4, 24, 44 Services: Birth Control Counseling Contraception Emergency Contraception HIV Testing HPV Immunizations Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Sterilization * Women Transgender Hormone Therapy Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY NORTH
